sources: Standing builds (builds.json, one '<champion>-standard' preset per champion): item lists from each champion's WildRiftFire Patch 7.2 guide (https://www.wildriftfire.com/guide/<championId>, per-preset source field), fetched 2026-07-14. Items not present in this catalog were dropped, never substituted — most commonly Void Staff (removed from WR in 4.4 per the official wiki; WildRiftFire guides still list it), the Bulwark of the Mountain / Black Mist Scythe support quest-items (outside this catalog's scope), and Stormsurge (existence in current SR unconfirmable). 9 champions whose guides degraded below 4 mappable items were skipped: akali, aurora, bard, heimerdinger, katarina, kennen, lux, veigar, vladimir. Archetype labels and descriptions are editorial, derived from the mapped items' own catalog stats/effects.
Seeded from data/patches/7.1 (7.1g); unstamped values carry over unchanged and remain accurate as of 7.1g verification.

verified: false — the official WR wiki had not published 7.2 item/champion numbers as of this update (Yunara's own wiki page was an unpopulated stub; new/reworked item pages 404'd). Values are sourced from official Riot patch notes cross-checked against wildriftfire/wr-meta. Re-verify against the official wiki once it catches up. See ROSTER.md "Patch 7.2" section for exactly what's pending, including one unresolved discrepancy (Yunara's base attack speed: wildriftfire says 0.77, wr-meta says 0.75 — wr-meta used).
